description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The front display shows a lock screen with the time, date, and blurred wallpaper in blue, orange, and white hues, along with status icons at the top. The back is finished in a reflective silver or light gray material, with a dual camera module vertically aligned in the top left corner and a central logo. The sides are thin and black, likely made of metal or reinforced plastic, giving the device a sturdy yet lightweight feel. The rear surface is smooth and glossy, with minimal text and branding. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of high-end smartphones used in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, silver back, and dual rear cameras. The design is minimalist, with a glossy finish and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass touchscreen with a lock screen display, minimal bezels, and no visible buttons.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the device's slim, black edge and thin form factor, with no visible buttons or features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a reflective silver back, dual camera module in the top left, and a central logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim, black edge with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized, dark logo is centered on the back of the device, resembling the Apple logo but with a slight modification.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a lock screen with the time '09:41', the date 'Dienstag, 12. September', a blurred abstract wallpaper in blue, orange, and white, and status icons for lock, signal, and battery.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash module.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are visible in any of the views.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: A slim, black frame or bumper surrounds the device, likely providing minimal protection, but no full case or cover is present.
